     The Numbers Business Report

Peppermint (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,418,723Details
International Box Office $16,382,035
Worldwide Box Office $51,800,758
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,259,304
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,008,056
Total $13,267,360
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Young mother Riley North awakens from a coma after her husband and daughter are killed in a brutal attack on the family. When the system frustratingly shields the murderers from justice, Riley sets out to transform herself from citizen to urban guerilla. Channeling her frustration into personal motivation, she spends years in hiding honing her mind, body and spirit to become an unstoppable force—eluding the underworld, the LAPD and the FBI—as she methodically delivers her personal brand of justice.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,423,255 (37.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.64 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:68.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,980 opening theaters/2,980 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $46,499,224

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 7th, 2018 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: September 7th, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
September 13th, 2018 (Wide), released as БАГРОВАЯ МЯТА (Russia (CIS))
September 14th, 2018 (Wide) (France)
September 14th, 2018 (Wide) (Poland)
September 21st, 2018 (Wide), released as Peppermint: Ангел на възмездието (Bulgaria)
Video Release: November 20th, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2531 (Cert #51651), 6/13/2018)
Running Time: 102 minutes
Plot point: Corrupt Cops, Corrupt Judge, Death of a Son or Daughter, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Government Corruption, Revenge
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lakeshore Entertainment, STX Films, Huayi Brothers Pictures Ltd
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Young mother Riley North awakens from a coma after her husband and daughter are killed in a brutal attack on the family. When the system frustratingly shields the murderers from justice, Riley sets out to transform herself from citizen to urban guerilla. Channeling her frustration into personal motivation, she spends years in hiding honing her mind, body and spirit to become an unstoppable force—eluding the underworld, the LAPD and the FBI—as she methodically delivers her personal brand of justice.
